schema_note: Each component maps one actionable proposal topic to a page range and source files.

components.title: Company narrative and positioning
components.summary: Opening storyline covering who Factorial is, investor credibility, and business value framing before module-level details.
ae_actions: Use slides 3-6 for executive opening in first meeting.
Anchor conversation on business outcomes before product feature deep dive.

components.title: Value pillars by business function
components.summary: High-level capability stack: analytics, automation, talent, cost control, and IT operations integration.
ae_actions: Select one pillar matching prospect pain and jump to its module section.
Use as bridge between discovery and solution mapping.

components.title: Commercial packages and plan fit
components.summary: Plan structure, estimated business impact framing, and package combinations for different customer profiles.
ae_actions: Use to explain plan logic, not as final quote.
Validate headcount and scope before discussing final commercials.

components.title: Core HR and employee data foundation
components.summary: Foundational people data layer with employee database, job catalog, and access controls.
ae_actions: Position as baseline required for advanced modules.
Confirm data ownership and permission model early.

components.title: Compensation, payroll, and compliance sync
components.summary: Compensation workflows, payroll synchronization, and whistleblowing/compliance capabilities.
ae_actions: Use when CFO/Compliance are in room.
Tie payroll sync to auditability and reduction of manual errors.

components.title: Time, attendance, absences, and shifts
components.summary: Time control, overtime handling, leave management, and shift planning with operational scheduling tools.
ae_actions: Critical for retail/hospitality/workforce-heavy prospects.
Map current overtime, absence, and shift pain before demo.

components.title: Workspace and hybrid operations
components.summary: Desk and office booking capabilities for hybrid workplace management.
ae_actions: Use only when facilities/hybrid policy is active pain.
Keep as optional module to avoid proposal bloat.

components.title: Talent acquisition and recruitment
components.summary: Recruiting workflows, candidate management, and hiring pipeline structure.
ae_actions: Use with HR leader when hiring speed is a KPI.
Link to onboarding continuity after acceptance.

components.title: Performance, training, and learning
components.summary: Performance reviews, learning catalog, and LMS-driven team development.
ae_actions: Bundle with manager enablement and retention narrative.
Prioritize for organizations formalizing review cycles.

components.title: Engagement and employee retention
components.summary: Employee engagement instrumentation and continuous pulse/feedback mechanics.
ae_actions: Use when attrition or culture metrics are executive concerns.
Pair with performance module for full people-growth story.

components.title: Expenses, projects, and invoicing
components.summary: Expense automation, project profitability tracking, and invoice workflow components.
ae_actions: Essential for finance operations and services organizations.
Connect to BC integration value for end-to-end traceability.

components.title: Procurement, IT, and device lifecycle
components.summary: Purchase approvals, IT provisioning, permissions, and asset lifecycle governance.
ae_actions: Use when IT and HR workflows are disconnected.
Highlight automation of grant/update/revoke access controls.

components.title: Product innovation and AI updates
components.summary: Recent product updates including UX redesign, AI assistant capabilities, and module enhancements.
ae_actions: Use as credibility booster late in cycle.
Avoid leading discovery with roadmap-first messaging.

components.title: Quote templates and commercial examples
components.summary: Sample quote layouts for subscription and onboarding examples.
ae_actions: Use internally as structure reference only.
Never send without validating terms and customer scope.

components.title: Customer proof, integrations, and support
components.summary: Customer logos/proof, integration breadth, and support model performance indicators.
ae_actions: Use to reduce perceived implementation risk.
Bring support slides when objection is response time or coverage.

components.title: Security, compliance, and demo close
components.summary: Security architecture, certifications, compliance posture, and closing call-to-action slides.
ae_actions: Mandatory for regulated prospects and legal reviews.
End deck with demo-access slide only after stakeholder alignment.
